name: google_stitch_skill
description: Generation of user interface screens through Google Stitch (artificial intelligence) with direct access through StitchMCP. Rapid ideation after an Approved UX Proposal, prompt engineering, quality control. Tied to the UX/UI Designer gate.
default_prompt: Use $google_stitch_skill when the task matches the "Google Stitch" skill.
triggers: Generation of user interface screens through Google Stitch (artificial intelligence) with direct access through StitchMCP
